'''竏嗷-zh-s-t''' ('''karazhsetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarr|yarr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarr|yarr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-zh-s-t
|-
! Lemma
| karazhsetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazhsetoko|thirazhsetoko]] || [[word:jirazhsetoko|jirazhsetoko]] || [[word:shirazhsetoko|shirazhsetoko]] || [[word:kirazhsetoko|kirazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurazhsetoko|thuthurazhsetoko]] || [[word:jujurazhsetoko|jujurazhsetoko]] || [[word:shushurazhsetoko|shushurazhsetoko]] || [[word:kukurazhsetoko|kukurazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurazhsetoko|thurazhsetoko]] || [[word:jurazhsetoko|jurazhsetoko]] || [[word:shurazhsetoko|shurazhsetoko]] || [[word:kurazhsetoko|kurazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurazhsetoko|thurazhsetoko]] || [[word:jurazhsetoko|jurazhsetoko]] || [[word:shurazhsetoko|shurazhsetoko]] || [[word:kurazhsetoko|kurazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therazhsetoko|therazhsetoko]] || [[word:jerazhsetoko|jerazhsetoko]] || [[word:sherazhsetoko|sherazhsetoko]] || [[word:kerazhsetoko|kerazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorazhsetoko|thothorazhsetoko]] || [[word:jojorazhsetoko|jojorazhsetoko]] || [[word:shoshorazhsetoko|shoshorazhsetoko]] || [[word:kokorazhsetoko|kokorazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhsetoko|thorazhsetoko]] || [[word:jorazhsetoko|jorazhsetoko]] || [[word:shorazhsetoko|shorazhsetoko]] || [[word:korazhsetoko|korazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhsetoko|thorazhsetoko]] || [[word:jorazhsetoko|jorazhsetoko]] || [[word:shorazhsetoko|shorazhsetoko]] || [[word:korazhsetoko|korazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦrazhsetoko|thﾃｦrazhsetoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦrazhsetoko|jﾃｦrazhsetoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦrazhsetoko|shﾃｦrazhsetoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦrazhsetoko|kﾃｦrazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharazhsetoko|thatharazhsetoko]] || [[word:jajarazhsetoko|jajarazhsetoko]] || [[word:shasharazhsetoko|shasharazhsetoko]] || [[word:kakarazhsetoko|kakarazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharazhsetoko|tharazhsetoko]] || [[word:jarazhsetoko|jarazhsetoko]] || [[word:sharazhsetoko|sharazhsetoko]] || [[word:karazhsetoko|karazhsetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharazhsetoko|tharazhsetoko]] || [[word:jarazhsetoko|jarazhsetoko]] || [[word:sharazhsetoko|sharazhsetoko]] || [[word:karazhsetoko|karazhsetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
